summary: The diff implements most of the required features across backend and frontend. Backend covers product catalog, order management, delivery settings, promo codes, promotional offers, payment records, and user profiles. Frontend covers all major pages (home, products, cart, checkout, order success, order history, admin dashboard) and UI components. However, a few specific acceptance criteria appear missing or unverifiable from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Products have an image (blob) field as specified — the backend uses imageUrl (a Text/URL) instead of a blob image field
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-1 AC states 'Products have name, price, category, description, image (blob), stock, and discount fields'. The backend/main.mo and frontend code consistently use imageUrl as a Text string URL, not a blob/binary image field.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-1: Categories can be managed independently via a dedicated admin UI
missing_requirements.reason: The admin dashboard has tabs for Products, Orders, Payments, and Offers but no dedicated Category management tab or UI for creating/updating/deleting categories independently, though backend functions exist.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-11: Active promotional offers are displayed on the checkout page
missing_requirements.reason: The CheckoutPage file content is omitted due to truncation limits. It cannot be confirmed that active promotional offers are shown on the checkout page.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-15: App works in both light and dark modes with a user-accessible theme toggle
missing_requirements.reason: ThemeProvider with defaultTheme='light' is used, but there is no evidence of a theme toggle control exposed to users in the navbar or elsewhere in the visible diff.

hallucinated_features.description: DemoBanner component showing a 'Demo Mode' alert banner when products are present
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request asks for a demo mode banner or any such informational alert strip in the UI.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal that prompts new authenticated users to enter their display name on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 asks for user profile get/upsert functions but does not specify an automatic modal prompt for profile setup on authentication.

hallucinated_features.description: RoleSwitcher component showing a fixed badge indicating current user role (Admin/Customer)
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement asks for a visible role indicator badge fixed to the screen corner.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for migrating legacy actor state from a previous schema version
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration from a legacy schema or previous version. This is an added file not requested.
